title: Coding with ADK to beat a text adventure game
summary: Google Cloud Tech hosted a livestream on coding with the Agent Development Kit to solve a text adventure game. The session featured speakers Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar demonstrating practical application of ADK.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech livestream walks through using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to build agents that solve a text adventure game. Speakers Tilde Thurium and Abdel Sghiouar demonstrate the framework in a hands-on coding session, applying it to a concrete task rather than abstract description. The example surfaces agent orchestration and how AI agents coordinate to work through a problem.
